body:
[//]: # (dependabot-start) ⚠️ **Dependabot is rebasing this PR** ⚠️ Rebasing might not happen immediately, so don't worry if this takes some time. Note: if you make any changes to this PR yourself, they will take precedence over the rebase. --- [//]: # (dependabot-end) Updates the requirements on [CUDA](https://github.com/JuliaGPU/CUDA.jl) to permit the latest version. Updates `CUDA` to 6.2.0
Release notes

Sourced from CUDA's releases.

v6.2.0

CUDA v6.2.0

Diff since v6.1.0

Merged pull requests:

  • Add a dispatch for LinearAlgebra.norm2 (#2302) (@​sharanry)
  • cuSPARSE: Fix densetosparse for empty matrices (#2575) (@​amontoison)
  • Add intrinsics with directed rounding (#2576) (@​orkolorko)
  • Wrap and test some more Float16 intrinsics (#2644) (@​kshyatt)
  • cuStateVec: Added new AI and fixed type errors (#2728) (@​LeeQY1996)
  • cuSPARSE: Fix conversion of 0x0 CuSparseMatrixCSC <-> CSR (#2806) (@​tam724)
  • cuSPARSE: Interface generic mv! for SparseMatrixBSR (#2929) (@​amontoison)
  • [CI] Merge docker images across platforms (#3003) (@​giordano)
  • cuSPARSE: Implement dense * coo matmul without prior sorting (#3005) (@​tam724)
  • cuSPARSE: Align default behavior of higher-dimensional similar with SparseArrays (#3091) (@​alonsoC1s)
  • Added Base.similar methods for CuSparseMatrixCOO and BSR (#3114) (@​rainerrodrigues)
  • Rework memory reclamation API; reduce memory usage (#3118) (@​maleadt)
  • Fix Int32 overflow in !range metadata for large intrinsics (#3119) (@​rainerrodrigues)
  • Add DOI to citation in CITATION.bib (#3123) (@​cwittens)
  • Add support for family- and architecture-specific features (#3124) (@​AntonOresten)
  • Bump julia-actions/setup-julia from 2 to 3 (#3125) (@​dependabot[bot])
  • Remove convert method piracy, avoiding downstream invalidations. (#3126) (@​maleadt)
  • Add adapt_storage methods for explicit sparse formats in CuSparse arrays (#3129) (@​albertomercurio)
  • Adapt to GPUCompiler.jl changes, using lazy-linking. (#3131) (@​maleadt)
  • Add early exit and tests for sortperm on empty arrays (#3133) (@​kshyatt)
  • Improve runtime selecton (#3134) (@​maleadt)
  • Fix misreport of non-SMEM launch failures as SMEM overflow (#3135) (@​AntonOresten)
  • Support BFloat16 in cuDNN (#3136) (@​maleadt)
  • Support mixed-eltype sparse/dense matmul (#3128) (#3137) (@​maleadt)
  • Name register pressure in launch-failure diagnostics (#3138) (@​AntonOresten)
  • Improve toolkit version detection. (#3139) (@​maleadt)
  • Add BFloat16 tests. (#3140) (@​maleadt)
  • Add a weak dependency edge from CUDACore to CUDA. (#3141) (@​maleadt)
  • Revert "Fix Int32 overflow in !range metadata for large intrinsics" (#3145) (@​maleadt)
  • Avoid jitter with some benchmarks (#3146) (@​maleadt)
  • Reduce usage of libdevice, relying more on LLVM (#3149) (@​maleadt)
  • Couple of minor fixes (#3151) (@​maleadt)
  • Marking some missed synchronization functions as device functions (#3153) (@​apozharski)
  • Remove spurious backticks in has_cuda docstring (#3154) (@​giordano)
  • Support for CUDA toolkit 13.3 (#3155) (@​maleadt)
  • Mark some more identifiers public. (#3156) (@​maleadt)
  • Fix pointer types in cublasHgemm (#3157) (@​lpawela)
  • Make the compiler params extensible (#3159) (@​wsmoses)
  • Use a private task-local RNG for kernel launch seeds (#3161) (@​JohnCobbler)
  • Use an up-to-date LLVM by relying on an external llc. (#3162) (@​maleadt)
  • Add dp4a device intrinsic (#3163) (@​JohnCobbler)
  • cuBLASXt: only grant pool access to peer-capable devices (#3166) (@​JohnCobbler)
  • Backports for 5.11 (#3168) (@​wsmoses)

... (truncated)

Commits
  • See full diff in compare view

Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore major version` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency's major version (unless you unignore this specific dependency's major version or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore minor version` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency's minor version (unless you unignore this specific dependency's minor version or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore ` will close this group update PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for the specific dependency (unless you unignore this specific dependency or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot unignore ` will remove all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot unignore ` will remove the ignore condition of the specified dependency and ignore conditions
--- Close #5697, close #5582.

labels.name: dependencies

title: Bump CUDA in /test
